entities.name: inbox-process
entities.context: Command that analyzes inbox files and routes them based on confidence thresholds

entities.name: cleanup-root
entities.context: Workflow step that moves files from root to Inbox/

entities.name: clearinghouse workflow
entities.context: Three-step workflow: cleanup-root → inbox-process → human review

entities.name: confidence thresholds
entities.context: Framework for auto-routing (85%+) vs suggesting (60-84%) file destinations

entities.name: gpt-5
entities.context: LLM model used for inbox analysis

entities.name: REVIEW.md
entities.context: Human-readable summary document grouped by confidence level with TTL warnings

entities.name: inbox_analysis.jsonl
entities.context: Analysis log with destination, confidence, reasoning per file

entities.name: inbox TTL policy
entities.context: 14-day time-to-live alert threshold for inbox files

entities.name: routing accuracy target
entities.context: Target >95% correct routing for inbox items

relationships.context: First step moves files from root to Inbox/
Second step analyzes and routes inbox files
Uses gpt-5 as analysis_model for file classification
Routes files based on 85% auto-route and 60% suggest thresholds
Writes analysis log entries per file
Alerts if inbox files exceed 14 days
